name: Silver Spring Towers
bathroomsNote: All unit types (studio, 1BR, 2BR) share the same 1-bathroom configuration

notes.petDetail: Cats only per Southern Management's official features page; $25/mo cat rent. Some third-party listings indicate dogs allowed, but the operator site and RentCafe both say cats only.
notes.laundryDetail: 24-hour shared laundry rooms on each floor; no in-unit washer/dryer. Residents pay per use.
notes.balconyDetail: Not mentioned on Southern Management features page or RentCafe. No resident reviews confirm balconies. Marked Unclear.
notes.packageDetail: No dedicated package room listed. 24-hour concierge handles package receipt per resident reviews on VeryApt. Marked Unclear for a dedicated room.
notes.wellMaintainedDetail: Management praised as responsive (VeryApt 8.2/10 management score). Some reviewers call the building dated (built 1966) and note occasional false fire alarms from gas heating systems. Mixed but leaning adequate.
notes.doormanDetail: '24-Hour Concierge Service' stated on Southern Management features page and RentCafe. VeryApt residents reference '24h front door people' and concierge package pickup. Confirmed 24h.
notes.elevatorDetail: 15-story tower. Elevator confirmed via VeryApt amenity listing and standard high-rise expectation.
notes.climateDetail: Central A/C listed as an in-unit feature on RentCafe and the Southern Management features page. Whether the thermostat is individually controlled or building-controlled is not stated. Marked Unclear.
